Description__c: This credit rule automatically awards $5 resort credit when a guest creates a new booking for any experience.
Name: New Booking Bonus

Description__c: Automatically awards $2 resort credit when a case is created and assigned to a guest contact.
Name: Case Assignment Credit

Description__c: This credit rule automatically awards $2 additional resort credit when a case assigned to a guest is successfully closed.
Name: Case Resolution Bonus

Description__c: This credit rule automatically awards $5 resort credit when a guest submits a review for an experience.
Name: Review Reward
